chapter_title.en: The Reward of Helping a Believer, Relieving Him of Distress And Showing Him Kindness

text: 118 - وعن أبي جعفر عليه السلام: من قضى لمسلم حاجته ناداه الله عز وجل: ثوابك علي، ولا أرضى لك ثوابا دون الجنة.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 118. It has been reported that Abu Ja'far (a.s) said: One who fulfils the need of a Muslim will be called out to by Allah [M.G] saying, 'your reward is upon Me and I shall not be satisfied with a reward for you less than Paradise.
